articles.title: Oil Price Today (June 5): Crude oil holds ground as Iran peace deal uncertainty lingers. Where are prices headed?
articles.description: Oil prices held steady on Friday following significant Thursday losses. Hopes for a quick resolution to the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran diminished after Hezbollah rejected a new ceasefire proposal. Despite this, both Brent and WTI crude benchmarks are on track for their first weekly gain in three weeks.

articles.title: RBI MPC Meeting 2026 LIVE Updates: Will Governor Sanjay Malhotra hold repo rate amid West Asia crisis? Key triggers to watch
articles.description: RBI MPC Meeting 2026 Today LIVE Updates: RBI to announce its policy decision today amid rising crude oil prices, fuel inflation and El Niño risks.

articles.title: RBI MPC meeting: Key decisions on growth, inflation outlook today; Check when & where to watch
articles.description: The six-member MPC, chaired by RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra, began its three-day policy meeting on Wednesday, June 3, amid rising global uncertainty, unpredictable crude oil prices, and pressure on the Indian rupee

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices on June 5: Check fuel cost in Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Kolkata and other cities today
articles.description: Fuel prices were unchanged today on Friday, 5 June. The last fuel price hike was on Monday, 25 May, when oil marketing companies (OMCs) hiked both petrol and diesel prices by more than ₹2.50 per litre.

articles.title: Oil little changed on uncertainty over US-Iran peace deal
articles.description: Oil prices saw little change on Friday after a significant drop. Hopes for an early end to the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran have faded. This follows the Hezbollah militia rejecting a new ceasefire in Lebanon. Fighting in the Middle East has caused oil prices to rise this week. Global oil inventories are a concern for the third quarter.

articles.title: Oil prices steady post first decline this week on US
articles.description: Oil prices steady after first weekly drop as Brent hovers near 95, WTI under 93, amid stalled US Iran talks and Hezbollah rejecting a Lebanon ceasefire

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel Prices On June 5: Another Hike Soon? Check New Rates In Mumbai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Chennai And More
articles.description: Fuel prices in India depend on several factors, with global crude oil prices being the most significant as crude is the primary raw material used to produce petrol and diesel.

articles.title: The Dow leaps to a record as oil prices ease and stocks outside of AI rally
articles.description: The expectation on Wall Street seems to be that the United States and Iran will ultimately agree to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to oil tankers.

articles.title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks slip as AI rally stalls, oil steadies
articles.description: Asian stocks declined as AI shares pulled back and Middle East tensions weighed on investor sentiment. South Korean shares saw a significant drop, impacting the broader MSCI Asia Pacific Index. Meanwhile, oil prices steadied, and gold held its gains as traders awaited key US jobs data.

articles.title: Oil Prices On June 5: Brent Crude Steadies Near $95 As Trump Signals Progress In US-Iran Talks
articles.description: Brent crude traded around $95 a barrel after falling 2.8% in the previous session, while US benchmark West Texas Intermediate hovered below $93 a barrel.
